title: UKAEA pension schemes: combined annual accounts 2024 to 2025
body: "This is the combined account for the UK Atomic Energy Authority’s (UKAEA) public service pensions schemes for the year to 31 March 2025. It covers:   the payment of pensions and other benefits to retired members or their dependants transfer values for members transferring to other schemes repayments of contributions under the authority’s pension schemes   "
